desc: Allows the user to transform into a mythical yokai, Bakotsu. The user can transform into a giant monstrous skeletal horse, and a human-bakotsu hybrid resembling a centaur at will. As a Mythical Zoan, while transformed, the user is gigantic, highly durable, and possesses great strength. Additionally, the user exhibits extreme speed and agility and can create ice, enhancing their sword to freeze targets

name: Yokai Yokai no Mi: Model Fengxi
exerpt: Can turn into a monstrous fengxi or fengxi hybrid at will
desc: Allows the user to transform into a mythical yokai, Fengxi. The user can transform into a giant monstrous four-tusked boar demon, and a hybrid form at will. As a Mythical Zoan, while transformed, great strength, and a particularly durable hide, capable of withstanding extreme physical attacks and negating certain abilities. In this form, the user can unleash powerful, Haki-infused roars, convert their tusks into massive blades, and perform powerful tackles

name: Yokai Yokai no Mi: Model Gyūki
exerpt: Can turn into a monstrous gyuki or gyuki hybrid at will
desc: Allows the user to transform into a mythical yokai, Bakotsu. The user can transform into a monstrous bull-spider, and a hybrid form at will. As a Mythical Zoan, while transformed, the user is gigantic, highly durable, and possesses great strength, capable of piercing even strong materials. Their body contains corrosive poison, powerful legs, and flight capabilities achieved by spinning. The user can also spit venomous orbs that produce massive explosions

name: Yokai Yokai no Mi: Model Itsumade
exerpt: Can turn into a monstrous itsumade or itsumade hybrid at will
desc: Allows the user to transform into a mythical yokai, Itsumade. The user can transform into a giant monstrous bird with a serpentine body, and a hybrid form at will. As a Mythical Zoan, while transformed, the user is gigantic, highly durable, and possesses great strength, capable of piercing even strong materials. The user can also fly and fire a powerful energy beam from their mouth, capable of destroying metal structures and igniting flames that can burn even giants

name: Yokai Yokai no Mi: Model Sandowāmu
exerpt: Can turn into a monstrous sandworm or sandworm hybrid at will
desc: Allows the user to transform into a mythical yokai, Sandworm. The user can transform into a giant monstrous sandworm, and a sandworm hybrid at will. As a Mythical Zoan, while transformed, the user is gigantic, highly durable, and possesses great strength. The user can withstand intense fire, swallow opponents whole, and create a powerful vacuum breath that affects entire islands. This ability allows the user to spit out swallowed objects with force, dig through the earth, and bite through hard substances

name: Yomi Yomi no Mi
exerpt: Can come back to live after dying once and gains soul-related abilities
desc: Allows the user to come back to life after dying once, granting a form of immortality until a second death. The user's soul can return to a lifeless body and support its well-being even if the body is in poor condition. While undead, the user can still feel pain and has abilities such as astral projection, allowing the soul to leave the body. The fruit also enables the user to repair their body and transfer energy to objects, creating ice or overwhelming other soul based entities. However, the user is vulnerable to damage when their soul is out of their body and requires a physical body to function normally

name: Yuki Yuki no Mi
exerpt: Can create, control, and transform into snow at will
desc: Allows the user to create, control, and transform into snow at will. The user can create massive amounts of snow, propelling them across large distances at ease. As pure snow the user is intangible, with normal attacks passing straight through them. Th user is also weak to heat

name: Zou Zou no Mi
exerpt: Can turn into an elephand or elephant hybrid at will
desc: Allows the user to transform into an elephant hybrid or a full elephant at will

name: Zou Zou no Mi, Model: Mammoth
exerpt: Can turn into a mammoth or mammoth hybrid at will
desc: Allows the user to transform into a mammoth hybrid or a full mammoth at will

name: Zuma Zuma no Mi
exerpt: Can create, control, and transform into plasma at will
desc: Allows the user to create, control, and transform into plasma at will. As pure plasma, the user is intangible, with normal attacks passing straight through them

name: Zushi Zushi no Mi
exerpt: Can generate and control powerful gravitational forces
desc: Allows the user to generate and control powerful gravitational forces. The user can manipulate gravity to move objects and living things with ease, from debris to large structures like battleships, and even pull down meteors from space. This ability grants precision telekinesis and simulated flight by altering gravity's direction. The user can maintain multiple gravity fields simultaneously and create floating platforms. However, the user's gravity powers can be disrupted by direct attacks, and they cannot affect themselves with gravity, requiring a platform for flight
